_publications._publicationTitle: MEK Inhibition Enhances the Antitumor Effect of Radiotherapy in NF1-Deficient Glioblastoma.

_contextSnippet: small molecule allosteric MEK1/2 inhibitor, mirdametinib...highest sensitivity in those with loss of NF1 or BRAF V600E alterations...decreased transcription of both genes following 24 hours of treatment with MEKi
details: Small molecule allosteric MEK1/2 inhibitor showing highest sensitivity in NF1-deficient and BRAF V600E lines, decreased BRCA2 and RAD51 expression, and synergistic effects with radiation in NF1-deficient models
